title: I Want My Sugarcane!
description:
For the people that want it, so now, YOU CAN BONEMEAL SUGARCANE!
sorry for the bad image!
body:
Welcome to **I Want My Sugarcane!** Where it allows you to bonemeal sugarcane like in **Bedrock Edition!**

**--Bonemealing Info--**

- Bonemeals the sugarcane up to 3 sugarcane
- Super efficient, you dont need any more farms

Thats about it!

**Made by MaceMeta**
